body.title: Add bash→run_bash tool alias
body.result: Tool name alias 'bash' → run_bash registered in tools/registry.py (LOW inertia). Both names route to same function. All 52 tests pass. Manual test verified — Igor can call either 'bash' or 'run_bash' interchangeably. Committed to main.
body.description: Igor's tier.2 Ollama sometimes calls 'bash' instead of registered 'run_bash'. Defensive alias prevents tool-fail cycle. Change: tools/registry.py or relevant dispatcher — map alias 'bash' → run_bash function. Test: manual or existing tool tests. LOW inertia. Scope OUT: tool behavior changes, gateway changes, tier logic.
